system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_baogia_thanhpham_getlist","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_BAOGIA_THANHPHAM_GETLIST]
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT a.daxem, a.masp
		, b.tensp, b.tensp_vn
		, b.hehang
		, mausac = CASE WHEN dbo.getColorName(b.mausac) IS NULL THEN b.mausac ELSE CONCAT(dbo.getColorName(b.mausac), ' (', b.mausac, ')') END 
		, b.customer
		, b.kichthuoc
		, b.bemat_sanpham
		, b.cbm
		, tigia = ISNULL(a.tigia, 0) 
		, thanhtien = sum(a.thanhtien) 
		, thanhtien_usd = SUM(CASE WHEN ISNULL(a.tigia, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE a.thanhtien/a.tigia END) 
		, b.dongia * ISNULL(a.tigia, 0) as dongia_vnd
		, b.dongia AS dongia_usd
		, b.ngaybaogia, b.hanbaogia, a.baoGiaID, a.revision
		, a.ghichu, b.nguyenlieu
		, m3_tc = SUM(DISTINCT COALESCE(B.m3_tc, 0))
	INTO #baogia
	FROM tr_baogia_thanhpham a
		INNER JOIN tr_sanpham b ON a.masp = b.masp
	WHERE A.tenchiphi NOT IN (N'Margin (10%)')
	GROUP BY a.daxem, a.masp
		, b.tensp, b.tensp_vn
		, b.hehang, b.mausac
		, b.customer
		, b.kichthuoc
		, b.bemat_sanpham
		, b.cbm
		, a.tigia
		, b.dongia
		, b.ngaybaogia, b.hanbaogia, a.baoGiaID, a.revision, a.ghichu, b.nguyenlieu
	ORDER BY A.masp, A.revision


	SELECT a.daxem,a.masp,a.tensp, a.tensp_vn,
		a.hehang,
		a.mausac ,
		a.customer,
		a.kichthuoc,
		a.bemat_sanpham,
		a.cbm,
		a.tigia ,
		a.thanhtien ,
		a.thanhtien_usd,
		a.dongia_vnd,
		a.dongia_usd,
		b.money_target,
		a.baoGiaID,
		a.revision,
		b.ngaybaogia,
		b.ngayhethan,
		--CASE WHEN a.baoGiaID is null then a.ngaybaogia else b.ngaytao end ngaybaogia,
		--CASE WHEN a.baoGiaID is null then a.hanbaogia else b.ngaytao end hanbaogia,
		b.ngaytao,
		COALESCE(a.ghichu, b.ghichu) AS  ghichu,
		a.nguyenlieu,
		C.FullName AS nguoitao,
		A.m3_tc,
		dongia_m3_usd = IIF(A.m3_tc = 0, 0, A.thanhtien_usd / A.m3_tc),
		dongia_m3_vnd = IIF(A.m3_tc = 0, 0, A.thanhtien / A.m3_tc)
	FROM #baogia a
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia2_danhsach b ON a.baoGiaID = b.id
		LEFT JOIN SYS_USER C ON B.nguoitao = C.UserName

	DROP TABLE #baogia

END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.sys_user","dbo.tr_baogia2_danhsach","dbo.tr_baogia_thanhpham","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
